'''sapuzu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:khatchkar|khatchkar]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-p-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:khatchkar|khatchkar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| sapuzu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæpizith|sæpizith]] || [[word:sæpizij|sæpizij]] || [[word:sæpizish|sæpizish]] || [[word:sæpizi|sæpizi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sapupuzuth|sapupuzuth]] || [[word:sapupuzuj|sapupuzuj]] || [[word:sapupuzush|sapupuzush]] || [[word:sapupuzu|sapupuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sapuzuth|sapuzuth]] || [[word:sapuzuj|sapuzuj]] || [[word:sapuzush|sapuzush]] || [[word:sapuzu|sapuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sapufzuth|sapufzuth]] || [[word:sapufzuj|sapufzuj]] || [[word:sapufzush|sapufzush]] || [[word:sapufzuf|sapufzuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sapuzuthu|sapuzuthu]] || [[word:sapuzuju|sapuzuju]] || [[word:sapuzushu|sapuzushu]] || [[word:sapuzuku|sapuzuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sapuzuth|sapuzuth]] || [[word:sapuzuj|sapuzuj]] || [[word:sapuzush|sapuzush]] || [[word:sapuzu|sapuzu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sapuzuthul|sapuzuthul]] || [[word:sapuzujul|sapuzujul]] || [[word:sapuzushul|sapuzushul]] || [[word:sapuzukul|sapuzukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sapuzuthuthu|sapuzuthuthu]] || [[word:sapuzujuju|sapuzujuju]] || [[word:sapuzushushu|sapuzushushu]] || [[word:sapuzuku|sapuzuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sapuzuthun|sapuzuthun]] || [[word:sapuzujun|sapuzujun]] || [[word:sapuzushun|sapuzushun]] || [[word:sapuzukun|sapuzukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sapuzuthuoro|sapuzuthuoro]] || [[word:sapuzujuoro|sapuzujuoro]] || [[word:sapuzushuoro|sapuzushuoro]] || [[word:sapuzukuoro|sapuzukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
